title: cirsium simplex subsp. simplex
intro: Cirsium simplex subsp. simplex, also known as the Western Plumeless Thistle, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to the western parts of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cirsium simplex subsp. simplex include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and address various health concerns.
